questions.question: What happens if you mark on Hidden check box of Font dialog box after you select some text?
options: The text is deleted from document and you need to bring from Recycle Bin if required again.
The text is hidden and you need to bring it by removing the check box if needed again
The text is deleted and cannot be returned back
The text is hidden and cannot be returned back

the document is the source document

To create a link within the document
